creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #10)
nextcloudclient-3.13.3 >> devel/kf6-kio >> devel/kf6-kbookmarks >> x11-themes/kf6-kcolorscheme >> x11-toolkits/kf6-kguiaddons (4/4)

Moved kio from KDE_USE to GUIADDONS_USE (BTW, GUIADDONS msut be early than KDE):

# DEVELOPER=YES make check-plist stage-qa
...
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/lib/libnextclouddolphinpluginhelper.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/qt5/libQt5Network.so.5 from net/qt5-network but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USES=qt:5 and USE_QT+=network
